content: website under construction -- I am a final year student pursuing B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering at International Institute of Information Technology, Hyderabad. I am working under the guidance of Dr Avinash Sharma at Center for Visual Information Technology (CVIT), KCIS, IIIT Hyderabad. My research interests include 3D Computer Vision, Graphics and Machine Learning.
summary: website under construction -- I am a final year student pursuing B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering at International Institute of Information Technology, Hyderabad. I am working under the guidance of Dr Avinash Sharma at Center for Visual Information Technology (CVIT), KCIS, IIIT Hyderabad. title: Chaitanya Patel

content: Implemented Visual Attention in CNN-RNN architecture for image captioning described in paper Show, Attend and Tell achieving the state of the art accuracy on MSCOCO dataset.
summary: Visual Attention mechanism in CNN-RNN architecture for image captioning on MS-COCO dataset
title: Attention Modeling for Image Captioning

content: Matlab implementation of Seam Carving algorithm for image upsizing, downsizing and object removal. Two types of cost functions were implemented - pixel entropy cost and image gradient cost.
summary: Seam Carving algorithm for content aware image resizing and object removal
title: Content Aware Image Resizing

content: Implemented new reinforcement learning operators like advantage learning and persistent advantage learning proposed in paper Increasing the Action Gap: New Operators for Reinforcement Learning. Comparative study was done for the performances of advantage learning, persistent advantage learning and Bellman operators with DQN architecture trained on 5 Atari games.
summary: Implemented new RL operators like persistent advantage learning and analyzed performance against Bellman operator with DQN
title: Persistent Advantage Learning

content: Implemented Visual Relative Attributes and Rank SVM for image classification and zero-shot learning based on ECCV-2011 best paper Relative Attributes.
summary: Visual Relative Attributes and Rank SVM for image classification and zero-shot Learning
title: Relative Attributes

content: Implemented Joint Spectral Correspondence proposed in a CVPR-2013 paper to match the images with disparate appearance arising from dramatic illumination (day vs night), age (historic vs new) and rendering style differences.
summary: Joint Spectral Eigen analysis to match the images with disparate appearance
title: Spectral Image Matching

content: Implemented Variational Autoencoder generative model in Keras for image generation and its latent space visualization on MNIST and CIFAR10 datasets.
summary: VAE in Keras for image generation and its latent space visualization on MNIST and CIFAR10 datasets
title: VAE for Image Generation
